title: Dts Modules Executor Schema
description: Assemble TypeScript declaration modules: copy, stamp with license, and strip debug blocks

sourceDir.description: Directory containing source .d.ts files (relative to project root).

outputDir.description: Output directory for assembled modules (relative to project root).

templatesDir.description: Directory containing static template files to overlay on the output (relative to project root).

licenseTemplateFile.description: Path to the license header template file (relative to project root).

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL embedded in the license header.
